mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
AND REGION LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N' AND USER_ID = #{userId}
AND CATEGORY = #{category}
mapper.sql: SELECT b.JOIN_NO , b.USER_ID , b.CATEGORY , b.PARTICIPANTS , b.REGION , b.START_DATE , b.END_DATE , b.TITLE , b.CONTENT , b.CREATE_DATE , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_REQUEST sub_r WHERE sub_r.JOIN_NO = b.JOIN_NO AND sub_r.STATUS = 'ACCEPTED') AS CURRENT_COUNT

, r.USER_ID AS REQ_USER_ID , r.JOIN_REQUEST_NO AS REQ_NO , f.FILE_PATH || f.CHANGE_NAME AS PROFILE FROM JOIN_BOARD b JOIN JOIN_REQUEST r ON b.JOIN_NO = r.JOIN_NO JOIN PLOGUES_USER u ON r.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN USER_FILE f ON u.USER_ID = f.USER_ID WHERE b.DELETED = 'N' AND r.STATUS = 'ACCEPTED'
mapper.select:
AND b.CATEGORY = 'PLANT'
AND REGION LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%'
ORDER BY b.JOIN_NO DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY

AND b.CATEGORY = 'PLOG'
AND REGION LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%'
ORDER BY b.JOIN_NO DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
, u.USER_NAME FROM JOIN_BOARD b JOIN PLOGUES_USER u ON b.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE b.DELETED = 'N' AND b.JOIN_NO = #{joinNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE JOIN_BOARD SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND JOIN_NO = #{joinNo}
